category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU binary tools for native development; current_curation.category_path lists developer-tools.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page is titled GNU Binutils; source_facts.name is binutils.
docs_sources: Official GNU Binutils page links documentation for the current release on sourceware.org; Sourceware hosts the current binutils manuals.
repo_sources: Official GNU Binutils page gives the anonymous git clone URL git://sourceware.org/git/binutils-gdb.git for the development source tree; HTTPS URL is the same official repository endpoint.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU page list binary development tools including ld, as, objdump, ar, nm, strip, and related utilities.
